certificate.description: The Thales IDCore 3230 / 230 Platform cryptographic module, validated to FIPS 140-3 overall Level 3, is a single-chip “contact” or “contact and contactless” module implementing the Global Platform operational environment, with Card Manager and Demonstration Applet. The Demonstration Applet is available only to demonstrate the complete cryptographic capabilities of the Module for FIPS 140-3 validation and is not intended for general use.

services.name: Lifecycle: Modify the card or applet life cycle status
services.input: Set / Get Status: life cycle state to update/ empty
services.output: return Status Word / life cycle state and package list

services.name: Manage Content: -Load, install, and delete application packages and associated keys and data -Manage keys: SD-KENC, SD-KDEK,SD- KMAC, DAP-SYM, DAP-ASYM, DM-TOKEN- SYM, DM-TOKEN-ASYM, DM-RECEIPT- SYM (Put key) -Update Pin to change the OS-GLOBALPIN
services.input: - applications and associated data - keys - OS-GLOBALPIN

services.name: Module Info (Auth): Read module configuration or status information (privileged data objects).
services.output: module configuration status information return Status Word

services.name: Secure Channel: Establish and use a secure communications channel (AES CMAC with KBKDF)
Digital Signature: Demonstrate RSA and ECDSA digital signature generation and verification
services.input: session, algorithm, algorithm parameters, data to sign.

services.name: Generate Key Pair: Demonstrate RSA and ECC key generation
services.output: public and private key generated return Status Word

services.name: ECC CDH Primitive: Demonstrate ECC Diffie-Hellman primitive Generate a shared secret from ECC-CDH scheme
services.input: algorithm, algorithm parameters, Ecc public key

services.name: Symmetric Cipher: Demonstrate use of AES for encryption and decryption.. Demonstrate use of Triple-DES for decryption only.
services.input: session, algorithm, algorithm parameters, data to encrypt/decrypt
services.output: encrypted / decrypted data, return Status Word.

services.name: Key-Derivation Functions (KDF): Demonstrate use of Keys diversification service • KDA HKDF • KDA OneStep
services.input: ikm (“input key material”) salt, fixed info counter, shared secret and Other info
services.output: okm: Output keys material return Status Word

services.name: Compute Hash: compute the hash value
Compute HashMac: compute the hashmac value
Context – Select an applet or manage logical channels.
Module Info - Read unprivileged data objects, e.g., module configuration or status information.
Module Reset - Power cycle or reset the Module. Includes Integrity Self-Test, periodic self-test counter set up and self-test flag is reset
Run Cryptographic KAT - Sets a flag to that a specific cryptographic KATs has been performed on demand via Module Reset.
Get Approved mode parameters - Get information of the approved mode of operation

OPACITY Secure Channel - Establishes a secure channel based on opacity to protect confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information and allows the off-card entity initiating the Opacity Secure Messaging to authenticate the module
services.output: control byte + nonce + cryptogram + cert return Status Word
